SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-20-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:17 am
Judge Pro tem, Deborah Daniloff, presiding; Clerk: Annie Pascual; not reported, Dept. 525.

Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant Spencer J. Thomas appears in pro per. Respondents Courtney Griffith, Mary Ellen Solon, and Rebbecca Gilbert appear in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Daniloff.

No new evidence collected from respondents, previous exhibit reviewed.

EXHA (2) Copy of checks
